commitMessage: Add Enter key to start new game from menu or game-over screen

topics.title: Enter key starts a new game from menu or game-over screen
topics.trigger: Players had no way to start a new game using the keyboard from the main menu or after a game ended, requiring them to use a different key or input method.
topics.response: Added a check in `handleKeyPress` in `src/main.ts` that intercepts the Enter key and calls `startNewGame()` when the game has not yet started or when the game-over state is active. The existing `R` key shortcut for restarting mid-session is unaffected.
topics.decisions: Enter was chosen as the trigger key for starting or restarting from menu and game-over screens rather than applying it universally, keeping the behavior contextual. Pressing Enter during active gameplay does nothing, which avoids accidental restarts mid-session.

recap: Players can now press Enter to start a new game from the main menu or after a game ends. The shortcut is active only when the game is not in progress, so there is no risk of accidentally triggering a restart during play.
